channel.title: GitHub Smalltalk Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Smalltalk in GitHub

item.title: svenvc/NeoJSON
item.description: NeoJSON is an elegant and efficient standalone Smalltalk framework to read and write JSON converting to or from Smalltalk objects.

item.title: pharo-contributions/XML-XMLParser
item.description: XML Parser for Pharo

item.title: svenvc/NeoCSV
item.description: NeoCSV is an elegant and efficient standalone Smalltalk framework to read and write CSV converting to or from Smalltalk objects.

item.title: pharo-contributions/OrderPreservingDictionary
item.description: a little preserving dictionary

item.title: pharo-contributions/XML-XMLWriter
item.description: This package provides a Seaside-like, block-based API for XML generation

item.title: pharo-contributions/BitmapCharacterSet
item.description: BitmapCharacterSet is a set for characters that uses a bitmap for storing wide characters and an array of truth values for byte characters. Used by XMLParser.

item.title: pharo-ide/Ghost
item.description: Ghost is framework to implement unnatural smalltalk objects like proxies or prototypes

item.title: svenvc/ztimestamp
item.description: I am ZTimestamp, a Magnitude, a point in time, an alternative to DateAndTime and TimeStamp

item.title: pharo-contributions/Athens-SVG
item.description: SVG support for Athens framework in Pharo

item.title: marianopeck/FFICHeaderExtractor
item.description: Program to extract constants from C headers and integrate that as FFI SharedPools

item.title: dionisiydk/StateSpecs
item.description: Object validation framework based on first class specs

item.title: dionisiydk/Mocketry
item.description: Mock objects framework

item.title: SeasideSt/Seaside
item.description: The framework for developing sophisticated web applications in Smalltalk.

item.title: kursjan/petitparser2
item.description: A high-performance top-down parser

item.title: msgpack/msgpack-smalltalk
item.description: MessagePack serialization library for various Smalltalk dialects / msgpack.org[Smalltalk]

item.title: SeasideSt/Grease
item.description: The Grease Portability Library

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-gleam
item.description: C wrapper around OpenGL bindings for Servo

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-examples
item.description: The engine for example-driven development in Pharo.

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-debugger
item.description: GT Debugger is a ... debugger. A moldable debugger.

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-releaser
item.description: The engine for releasing deeply nested projects.

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-remote
item.description: The engine to work with remote systems (like remote a Pharo image).

item.title: feenkcom/gt4famix3
item.description: This repository holds the Glamorous Toolkit extensions for Famix3.
